basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) Postdoctoral Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 1 Postdoctoral Fellow post. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Preferably less than 40 years of age.
age_limit.details: Postdoctoral Fellow: Preferably less than 40 years of age.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. degree holders in Chemistry/Materials Science.
qualification.details: Postdoctoral Fellow: Ph.D. degree holders in Chemistry/Materials Science. Expertise in the synthesis of materials such as metal organic framework, mesoporous silica, zeolites, etc. Experience in handling and interpreting basic analytical techniques employed in catalyst characterization techniques such as XRD, surface area analysis, adsorption techniques, temperature programmed desorption, etc. Good track record of quality publications. Good communication and writing skills in English.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per DST norm (HRA as per the institute rules)
salary_details.details: As per DST norm (HRA as per the institute rules)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 11 May 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Postdoctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Ph.D. degree in Chemistry or Materials Science to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age limit for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates are preferably less than 40 years of age for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is conducted via email. You need to send your application and documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary will be as per DST norms, with HRA provided as per the institute's rules.

faq.question: Q6. What specific research experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Experience in the synthesis of materials like metal organic framework, mesoporous silica, zeolites, and handling analytical techniques for catalyst characterization is preferred.

faq.question: Q7. How should the email application be formatted?
faq.answer: The subject line of your email should clearly state "Application for Postdoctoral Position, your name".

faq.question: Q8. What documents need to be sent with the application?
faq.answer: You need to send a completely filled application form, a detailed CV, and copies of all degree certificates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an interview, which will be conducted in an online mode.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
